{"type":"CODE_BUILDER","title":"Introduction to Python","lessonText":"In this lesson, you will learn how to write simple Python programs. Let's start with printing a message to the console.","data":{"codeBuilder":{"avatarInstruction":"Write a simple Python program to print 'Hello, World!'","lines":[{"content":"print('Hello, World!')","correctValue":"print('Hello, World!')"}],"options":["print('Hello, World!')","echo 'Hello, World!'","console.log('Hello, World!')","print('Hello World!')","print('Hello, Python!')","print('Hello, Universe!')","print('Hello, Everyone!')","print('Hello, User!')"]}}, "additionalGames":[{"title":"Basic Math Quiz","lessonText":"Solve the following math problems.","data":{"codeBuilder":{"avatarInstruction":"Write a Python program to add two numbers.","lines":[{"content":"a = 5
b = 3
print(a + b)","correctValue":"a = 5
b = 3
print(a + b)"}],"options":["a = 5
b = 3
print(a + b)","print(5 + 3)","sum = 5 + 3
print(sum)","add(5, 3)","print('5 + 3')"]}},{"title":"String Manipulation","lessonText":"Learn how to manipulate strings in Python.","data":{"codeBuilder":{"avatarInstruction":"Write a Python program to reverse a string.","lines":[{"content":"my_string = 'Python'
print(my_string[::-1])","correctValue":"my_string = 'Python'
print(my_string[::-1])"}],"options":["my_string = 'Python'
print(my_string[::-1])","print('Python'[::-1])","reversed('Python')","print(my_string.reverse())","my_string.reverse()"]}}]}
